metric_constraint_keys: <name>: scalar baseline value (informational only when paired with _tolerance)
<name>_tolerance: absolute symmetric tolerance band; outside is REGRESSED unless _regression_threshold is also set
<name>_floor: observed must be >= floor; below is REGRESSED
<name>_regression_threshold: absolute deviation that flips REGRESSED (combine with _tolerance for WARN tier)

iter7_to_8_grouped_union._NOTE: Placeholder pending iter7-to-8 completion; will be populated by populate_baseline.py once the iter_008.npz dump is captured.

source_runs.note: Initial baseline. Hard-assignment match rate is 0% because recovar Eulers use a different rotation convention than RELION's particle.star (per memory project_relion_parity_volume_negation/eulers); needs convention conversion before this metric becomes meaningful. sigma2_noise_ratio uses recovar's wsum_sigma2_noise (raw A2-2XA accumulator) which is in different units from RELION's sigma2_noise; band intentionally wide. vol_corr is negative because invert_data is not applied; vol_corr_abs is the sign-invariant version used as the floor.
